title: List of regulatory agencies and foreign jurisdictions - Canada.ca
content:
## List of regulatory agencies and foreign jurisdictions
This list is incorporated into the Medical Devices Regulations . It sets out the regulatory agencies and foreign jurisdictions for the purposes of section 61.2 of the Regulations .
The regulatory agencies and foreign jurisdictions that apply are listed below.
Date issued: December 23, 2020
Therapeutic Goods Administration (TGA)
Austrian Agency for Health and Food Safety (AGES)
Federal Agency for Medicines and Health Products (FAMHP)
National Health Surveillance Agency (ANVISA)
Bulgarian Drug Agency
National Medical Products Administration
Agency for Medicinal Products and Medical Devices of Croatia (HALMED)
Cyprus Medical Devices Competent Authority
State Institute for Drug Control
Danish Medicines Agency
Health Board, Medical Devices Department
Finnish Medicines Agency (FIMEA)
National Agency for the Safety of Medicine and Health Products  (ANSM)
Federal Institute for Drugs and Medical Devices (BfArM)
National Organization for Medicines (EOF)
National Institute of Pharmacy and Nutrition (OGYEI)
Health Products Regulatory Authority (HPRA)
Medical Devices and Active Implantable Medical Devices, Ministry of Health
Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency (PMDA) and the Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare (MHLW)
Ministry of Health of the Republic of Latvia- Health Inspectorate
State Health Care Accreditation Agency (VASPVT)
State Health Care Agency, Ministry of Health
Malta Competition and Consumer Affairs Authority (MCCAA)
Federal Commission for Protection Against Sanitary Risk (COFEPRIS)
Healthcare and Youth Care Inspectorate (IGZ)
Medicines and Medical Devices Safety Authority (MEDSAFE)
Office for Registration of Medicinal Products, Medical Devices and Biocidal Products
National Authority of Medicines and Health Products (INFARMED)
National Agency for Medicines and Medical Devices (NAMMDR)
Russian Ministry of Health
Health Sciences Authority (HSA)
State Institute for Drug Control (SIDC)
Agency for Medicinal Products and Medical Devices of the Republic (JAZMP)
Ministry of Food and Drug Safety
Spanish Agency for Medicines and Health Products (AEMPS)
Medical Products Agency (MPA)
Swiss Agency for Therapeutic Products (Swissmedic)
Medicines and Healthcare Products Regulatory Agency (MHRA)
United States Food and Drug Administration (US FDA)
United States of America
